summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Simple Finance Module (Phase 2) features: Investor Management, Capital Investment, Quick Transactions (Pay Salary, Pay Expense, Receive Revenue, Loan Transaction), Chart of Accounts, and Financial Reports. All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified all features working correctly.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions - not affecting functionality

frontend: Investors page - shows investor table with capital balances
Investors page - shows Withdrawal, Add Investment, Add Investor buttons
Quick Transactions - Pay Expense card and modal working
Quick Transactions - Pay Salary card visible
Quick Transactions - Receive Payment card visible
Quick Transactions - Loan Transaction card visible
Quick Transactions - Recent transactions section shows all transaction types
Chart of Accounts - shows all account types with correct balances
Chart of Accounts - investor capital accounts (31xx) appear under Equity
Financial Reports - Trial Balance shows 'Balanced' status
Financial Reports - P&L shows Income, Expenses, Net Profit correctly
Financial Reports - Balance Sheet is balanced (Assets = Liabilities + Equity)

seed_data_creation: Tests created additional investors, capital investments, salary payments, expense payments, revenue receipts, and loan transactions during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Simple Finance features fully tested: 1) Investor creation auto-generates capital account under Equity (31xx series), 2) Capital Investment correctly debits Cash, credits Capital Account, 3) Pay Salary debits Salaries & Wages (6100), credits Cash, 4) Pay Expense debits Expense account, credits Cash, 5) Receive Revenue debits Cash, credits Revenue account, 6) Loan Receive debits Cash, credits Loans Payable, 7) Chart of Accounts shows investor capital accounts under Equity, 8) All Financial Reports (Trial Balance, P&L, Balance Sheet) are balanced and calculating correctly.

investor_creation.feature: Create investor with auto-generated capital account under Equity (31xx series)
investor_creation.test_result: Working - Investor creation creates capital account with proper account type (equity) and category (capital)

capital_investment.test_result: Working - Double-entry journal entries correctly created

pay_salary.feature: Salary payment with allowances and deductions
pay_salary.journal_entry_verified: Debit Salaries & Wages (6100), Credit Cash (1100), Credit Tax Payable (2200) for deductions

pay_expense.feature: Expense payment for various expense types
pay_expense.test_result: Working - Multiple expense types map to correct accounts

receive_revenue.feature: Revenue receipt from sales, services, etc.
receive_revenue.test_result: Working - Multiple revenue types map to correct accounts

loan_transaction.journal_entry_verified: Receive: Debit Cash, Credit Loans Payable (23xx)
loan_transaction.test_result: Working - Loan types map to correct liability accounts

chart_of_accounts.feature: Investor capital accounts appear under Equity
chart_of_accounts.test_result: Working - 31xx accounts visible in Equity section with correct balances

trial_balance.test_result: Working - Shows 'Balanced' status, Total Debit = Total Credit

profit_loss.feature: P&L Report shows Income and Expenses
profit_loss.test_result: Working - Income: LKR 225,000, Expenses: LKR 163,000, Net Profit: LKR 62,000

balance_sheet.test_result: Working - Total Assets = LKR 943,000 = Total Liabilities & Equity

mocked_apis.note: All finance APIs are fully functional with real MongoDB persistence
